name: No Romance in Workplace
overview:
“Who exactly are you?”

After his father’s bankruptcy and tragic suicide, he infiltrates a major corporation to seek revenge! But he never expected to catch the attention of four strikingly different women!

The closer he gets to the truth, the greater the danger… When the truth is finally revealed, will he be able to walk away unscathed?

trailers.title: Short Drama No Romance in Worlplace - Only in Do Drama
